a:r.a:t: DQN proved effective in Gomoku, enhancing AI’s abilities. Certain model architectures and parameters significantly influenced performance, guiding algorithm optimization.
After training, DQN - based Gomoku AI showed improved decision - making and gaming skills. In battles, it had higher win rates and better decision - making.

Designed various DQN model architectures and parameter settings, evaluating performance via battles with human players and random AIs. Used multiple metrics for AI’s decision - making and gaming level.
